author: misilva73
content:
On today's ACDT, we discussed this [pr](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11778) from <@1252939266871263294> . The plan is to make a decision on whether to make this change on ACDT next week. If we decide to change this, it will only be introduced on glamsterdam-devnet-7. 
Coredevs, please take a look until EOW so that we can make a decision next monday
